description:
Operating Area: Turkey

LUCKY YOU is a 37.00m / 121ft Gulet Luxury Superyacht custom built in 2012. Sleeping 10 guests in 5 cabins with crew of 4. The guest cabins comprise a master cabin, two VIP cabins and two double cabins.

crew.name: Hasan Karaoğlu
crew.bio:
Turkish

Hasan is 24 years old and graduated in maritime studies in Turkey. He also holds a Class A Captain’s Diploma (Yacht Captain), as well as First Aid Certificates and expertise in various survival techniques. He has many years of experience in the yachting industry. Being a hardworking and responsible person, he will take great care of his guests. The lucky guests will surely enjoy their cruise in the hands of Captain Hasan, as they explore truly stunning destinations with turquoise waters. He speaks Turkish and English.

crew.name: Sezer Uzun
crew.bio:
Turkish

Sezer is 49 years old and He has all certificates about the kitchen and he is master class chef. He is working with the high quality restaurants , the hotels and the luxury yachts for more than 25 years and now he will prepare for the our guests delicious dishes of the Mediterranean cuisine, using the freshest ingredients and giving great attention to each detail on the presentation too. He has also some special recipes about the some different cuisine all over the worlds. Sezer has a pleasant character with a genuine smile on his face that will make the guests feel very comfortable onboard. In his spare time, he likes watching movies and spending time with his friends. He speaks Turkish and middle level English.

crew.name: Damla Nur Tekin
crew.bio:
Turkish

Damla is 26 years old and has been working as a hostess on quality yachts for 3 years. She holds all seamanship certificates and several workshop licenses. She builds very warm relationships with guests and is highly skilled in providing service on board. She always strives to do her best for the guests, and their happiness is very important to her. She enjoys traveling, learning about different cultures, and listening to music. She speaks Turkish and has an intermediate level of English.

crew.name: Alpay Cavdar
crew.bio:
Turkish

Alpay is 23 years old and he is graduated from seaman high scholl in Bodrum. He holds a sailor diploma and he also holds Certificates in First Aid and he is an expert in several Survival Techniques, counting many years of experience in the yachting industry. He has been working onboard luxury motor yachts for the last 5 years with great enthusiasm and passion for his job. Being a very sportive person himself, he will keep the guests active during their charter, helping them with all kind of water toys that are available onboard. He is a very smily person with a gentle character, always trying to assist on everything needed. When not working, Alpay enjoys reading book and swimming. Speaks Turkish and English.

crew.name: Çağrı Korkmaz
crew.bio:
Turkish

Çağrı is 24 years old and graduated from the seaman high school in Bodrum. He holds a sailor’s diploma, as well as First Aid Certificates and expertise in various survival techniques. He has many years of experience in the yachting industry. Being a very sportive person, he will keep the guests active during their charter, assisting them with all kinds of water toys available onboard. Always smiling and gentle in character, he is ready to help with anything needed. In his free time, he enjoys reading books and swimming. He speaks Turkish and English.
